utility_evaluation.REASONING: First, count the number of items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget — that is 5 items in total. Next, check the final coverage plan to see if each is present and fully specified with all details. 1) health_coverage: includes both physical and mental plans with costs, plus a total cost — fully specified. 2) property_coverage: has a plan name, details, and cost — fully specified. 3) travel_coverage: has a plan name, details, and cost — fully specified. 4) additional_services: contains a description (professional liability bundling compatibility) and cost — although the cost is ‘included via compatibility options’ rather than a numeric value, it still provides cost information, so it's considered specified. 5) total_budget: contains monthly and annual amounts — fully specified. All 5 items are present and sufficiently detailed.
